testSteps.description: Given I have test aggregate properties with id "test-aggregate-id", name "Test Aggregate", and version 1
And I have test passport with userId "test-user-id" and permissions ["read", "write"]
Given I have created a test aggregate
When I add an integration event with message "integration test message"
Then the aggregate should have 1 integration event

children.description: Test Actor ensures that 1 does equal 1

testSteps.description: And the integration event should have aggregateId "test-aggregate-id"

children.description: Test Actor ensures that "test-aggregate-id" does equal "test-aggregate-id"

testSteps.description: And the integration event should have the correct payload

children.description: Test Actor ensures that { message: "integration test message" } does equal { message: "integration test message" }

userStory.narrative:
As a domain developer
I want to use aggregate roots to manage domain and integration events
So that I can build robust domain models with event sourcing capabilities
